name: amaran SM5c LED Light Strip Extension
description: The 16.4' multicolor SM5c LED Light Strip Extension from amaran enables you to extend the standard SM5c light strip to a total length of 32.8'. Thanks to Bluetooth and Wi-Fi connectivity, a hub is not required to operate this strip.

features.Key Features:: 16.4' Smart LED Light Strip Extension | Extends Light Strip to 32.8' | 3200 to 6500K Color Temperature | 300 RGB LEDs Enable Customized Lighting | Bluetooth & Wi-Fi Wireless Connectivity | Flexible Flat Cable | Sidus Link App for iOS & Android | Use with Amazon Alexa & Google Assistant
features.What’s in the box?: amaran SM5c LED Light Strip Extension (16.4', Multicolor)
